T0070.title: Overnight Data
T0070.definition: After a data breach, some attackers may not immediately sell freshly obtained data on underground markets to mitigate risk. Instead, they delay the transaction until the following day or a later period; such data is referred to as 'overnight material.' The risks and losses from overnight data breaches may only surface after a delay, making timely prevention and remediation difficult.
